style_effects: Gentle, translucent water droplets cling to Dragonite's scales, slowly drifting upward like suspended pearls. A soft, luminous blue aura radiates from its body in rippling concentric circles, casting cool moonlight-like reflections on the surrounding air. The atmosphere glows with a serene, ethereal blue-white luminescence, evoking calm ocean depths. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
